Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4A00 "SPECIALAGENT-FIREBIRD-0400-4A00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Special Agent (Firebird).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0400 which copies 256 bytes of data from $0420 down to $0100 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $4A00 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the stack).
Note: the screen ram between $0400 - $07E8 was cleared as it still contained data from the loading bitmap which was no longer needed.
